sentences.arabic: يَحْمِلُ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ الْمُبَارَكُ بَيْنَ طَيَّاتِهِ أَجْوَاءً رُوحَانِيَّةً وَاجْتِمَاعِيَّةً فَرِيدَةً تَجْمَعُ الْعَائِلَاتِ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Blagoslovljeni mjesec Ramazan u sebi nosi jedinstvenu duhovnu i društvenu atmosferu koja okuplja porodice oko jedne sofre.
sentences.translationEn: The blessed month of Ramadan carries within it a unique spiritual and social atmosphere that gathers families around one table.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَ سَمَاعِ أَذَانِ الْمَغْرِبِ، يَبْدَأُ الصَّائِمُونَ إِفْطَارَهُمْ بِحَبَّاتِ التَّمْرِ وَالْمَاءِ، اتِّبَاعًا لِلسُّنَّةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الشَّرِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čuvši ezan za akšam, postači prekidaju post hurmama i vodom, slijedeći plemeniti Poslanikov sunnet.
sentences.translationEn: Upon hearing the sunset call to prayer, fasters begin their Iftar with dates and water, following the noble Prophetic Sunnah.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، تَتَزَيَّنُ الْمَوَائِدُ بِأَشْهَى الْمَأْكُولَاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَخْتَلِفُ مِنْ بَلَدٍ عَرَبِيٍّ لِآخَرَ، مِثْلِ الْكَبْسَةِ وَالْمَنْسَفِ وَالْحَرِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga, trpeze se krase najukusnijim tradicionalnim jelima koja se razlikuju od jedne do druge arapske zemlje, poput kabse, mansafa i harire.
sentences.translationEn: Afterwards, tables are adorned with the most delicious traditional dishes that vary from one Arab country to another, such as Kabsa, Mansaf, and Harira.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ أَهَمِّيَّةُ الشَّهْرِ عَلَى الصِّيَامِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ تَبْرُزُ فِيهِ قِيَمُ التَّكَافُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ مِنْ خِلَالِ مَوَائِدِ الرَّحْمَنِ لِلْفُقَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Važnost ovog mjeseca nije ograničena samo na post, već se u njemu ističu vrijednosti društvene solidarnosti kroz javne iftare za siromašne.
sentences.translationEn: The importance of the month is not limited to fasting alone, but the values of social solidarity emerge through public charity banquets for the poor.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي اللَّيَالِي، تَمْتَلِئُ الْمَسَاجِدُ بِالْمُصَلِّينَ، بَيْنَمَا تَزْدَانُ الشَّوَارِعُ بِالْفَوَانِيسِ وَالْأَنْوَارِ الْمُلَوَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Noću su džamije ispunjene vjernicima, dok su ulice ukrašene fenjerima i šarenim svjetlima.
sentences.translationEn: At night, mosques are filled with worshippers, while streets are decorated with lanterns and colored lights.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهُ وَقْتٌ لِلتَّأَمُّلِ وَالصَّفَاءِ الذِّهْنِيِّ، حَيْثُ يَتَقَرَّبُ النَّاسُ مِنْ بَعْضِهِمُ الْبَعْضِ بِالْمَحَبَّةِ وَالتَّسَامُحِ.
sentences.translation: To je vrijeme za razmišljanje i mentalni mir, u kojem se ljudi zbližavaju s ljubavlju i tolerancijom.
sentences.translationEn: It is a time for reflection and mental clarity, where people draw closer to one another with love and tolerance.
